channel.title: JPA on Jason's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in JPA on Jason's Blog

item.title: JPA开发指南
item.description: 设计数据库表 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `webpage`( `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT, `crc` BIGINT COMMENT '网址的CRC32', `url` LONGTEXT COMMENT '网址', `vice_url` LONGTEXT COMMENT 'AJAX请求网址', `title` LONGTEXT COMMENT '标题', `content` LONGTEXT COMMENT '网页文字内容'
